baseline_summary: The baseline contradiction route is correct, but the surrounding coherence can still compress living disagreement into a smoother consensus posture than the evidence supports.
delta_summary: Delta preflight marked high framing risk, challenge outcome confirmed, and 1 ledger entry captured why coherence can still compress unresolved disagreement into false consensus.

comparison_axes.reason: Both tracks keep the case inside contradiction review rather than a false clean resolution path.
Both tracks preserve the same hard proposal-only and no-runtime boundaries.
Delta is stronger at resisting the slide from coherence into implied consensus.
Delta keeps the missing decisive signals in the foreground.
Both tracks still support a bounded next move once the contradiction remains explicit.
